title: Looking for Category Manager at JioMart

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at JioMart
jsonLd.description:
Join the JioMart family as a Category Manager in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About JioMart:
JioMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart!
